# 50 Practice Problems on Your Mobile Dataset

## Beginner Level

1. Show first 5 rows

2. Show last 10 rows

3. Find total rows and columns

4. Show all column names

5. Check datatype of each column

6. Find missing values

7. Find duplicate rows

8. Count unique companies


11. Find all phones launched in 2023.

12. Find all Samsung phones.

13. Find all Xiaomi phones.

14. Find phones with battery greater than 5000 mAh.

15. Find phones with screen size larger than 6.5 inches.

16. Find phones costing more than ₹50,000 in India.

17. Find phones costing less than ₹20,000 in India.

18. Find phones with Snapdragon processor.

19. Find phones with MediaTek processor.

20. Find phones with 108MP back camera.

---

# Intermediate Level

21. Sort phones by India price ascending.

22. Sort phones by battery descending.

23. Find top 10 expensive phones in India.

24. Find top 5 cheapest phones in USA.

25. Find average India launch price.

26. Find maximum battery capacity.

27. Find minimum battery capacity.

28. Find average screen size.

29. Find average phone weight.

30. Count phones company-wise.

31. Count phones year-wise.

32. Find average India price company-wise.

33. Find average battery company-wise.

34. Find most common RAM size.

35. Find most common processor.

36. Find company with most phones.

37. Find company with highest average price.

38. Find phones having both 12GB RAM and 256GB storage (if storage exists).

39. Find all premium phones above ₹80,000.

40. Find phones launched between 2020 and 2023.

---

# Advanced Level

41. Create a new column called `"Price Category"`:

* Budget
* Mid-Range
* Premium

42. Find percentage of premium phones.

43. Compare India and USA prices.

44. Find correlation between battery and price.

45. Find correlation between screen size and price.
